description_for_human: Deploy HTML files and web projects instantly. Get a live URL in seconds — no signup required.
description_for_model: Drop Deploy is an instant HTML hosting service. Use it to deploy HTML files and ZIP web projects and get a live public URL immediately. Supports MCP protocol for seamless AI-assistant integration. Call deploy_html with HTML content to publish a page, or deploy_zip with base64-encoded ZIP to publish a multi-file project.
